3303200.name: BitSlaps
3303200.description:
ENTER THE GLADIATOR ARENA – FREE TO PLAY
Grab your friends (or foes) and dive into wild co-op chaos where anything can happen. In BitSlaps, sabotage, teamwork, and friendly betrayal collide inside ridiculous challenge arenas built for maximum fun.

UP TO 64-PLAYER CO-OP MAYHEM
Run, dodge, and outsmart your friends as you face unpredictable hazards, slap powers, and physics-based traps. Every session is a fresh dose of chaos — perfect for groups who love laughing, competing, and sabotaging each other.

CUSTOM MAPS & TRAP-FILLED ARENAS
Race through handcrafted levels with moving platforms, random events, and environmental hazards. With every map designed for hilarious disaster, no two rounds ever feel the same.

SLAPS, SABOTAGE & POWER-UPS
Unleash a wide range of slap abilities — freeze opponents, blast them into the air, or stun them at the perfect moment. Slaps can be earned through gameplay or purchased with inexpensive in-game coins.

CO-OP & FRIENDLY COMPETITION
Form squads, work together, or betray each other for a clutch victory. BitSlaps embraces co-op gameplay with a twist — cooperation is optional, and sabotage is always encouraged.

IN-APP PURCHASES
We offer a range of packages for coins which can be purchased from shop. Each bucket has certain amount of 'slaps' coins which can be then used to purchase in-game effects i.e slaps, boosts, nuclear.

EVENTS & NEW CONTENT
Jump into seasonal events, rotating maps, limited-time modes, and fresh slap types. BitSlaps evolves constantly with updates that keep the co-op mayhem unpredictable.

PERFECT FOR FRIEND GROUPS & STREAMER PARTIES
Invite your squad, assemble your co-op crew, and prepare for pure comedy. Whether you're working together or slapping each other into orbit, BitSlaps turns every session into a highlight moment.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
